target.title: feat: add tool search directory mode
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` so large catalogs can expose a compact prompt directory plus `tool_describe`/`tool_call` controls while deferring most schemas.
- Hydrate likely or requested directory tools from the catalog, including missing tool calls, while preserving sequential execution contracts.
- Keep client tools directly visible in directory mode and document the new mode.

Fork attribution: based on JuanHuaXu/openclaw `codex/tool-search-directory-mode`, compared from `codex/fix-post-tool-continuation-guard`.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.
- Hosted Crabbox/Testbox live E2E: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791

- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.


## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory" keeps authorized catalog schemas deferred while preserving normal validation, hooks, execution, result normalization, replay, and provider continuation. Exact head 15e019815c1cd1d8000438f55024dcd1c68b4040 also validates deferred resolver identity, keeps MCP schemas deferred during automatic directory hydration, removes inactive controls from capability guidance, and prevents unsafe external tool metadata from entering the high-trust directory prompt.
- Real environment tested: Exact head 15e019815c1cd1d8000438f55024dcd1c68b4040 was tested from the isolated PR worktree against current upstream/main (7bd533a80e9d622966cd31b9a80ec284f2fc9dd9). Direct sibling Codex current main f297b9f0c195f460ce1cf55dcd7adf58432bd7b3 was checked for deferred dynamic tools, MCP deferred exposure, tool-search response items, spec planning, and search handling. The earlier hosted live Testbox proof remains feature-head-only: tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts -- --reporter=dot; node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json across the six touched implementation/test files; ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check across those files; git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD; git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD; exact trusted brokered Kepler autoreview request.
- Evidence after fix:

Current head: 15e019815c1cd1d8000438f55024dcd1c68b4040
Current upstream/main: 7bd533a80e9d622966cd31b9a80ec284f2fc9dd9
Focused Vitest: 3 shards, 3 files, 68 tests passed
Scoped oxlint: passed
Scoped oxfmt: passed
git diff --check: passed
git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD: passed
Trusted brokered Kepler autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
overall: patch is correct (0.82)

- Observed result after fix: Exact-head deterministic proof covers directory catalog construction, exact-name deferred hydration through the normal agent loop, MCP deferral during automatic hydration, wildcard client allowlists, dispatch/replay/capability boundaries, resolver-error continuation, unsafe external metadata isolation, generated contract baselines, explicit-allowlist failure behavior, disabled-mode behavior, and current-main integration.
- What was not tested: Exact-head hosted live directory lookup, deferred execution, and provider continuation were not rerun after these focused repairs. The prior hosted Testbox pass remains on an earlier feature head. Protected operator/live channels were not used. Maintainers still need to decide whether the third persisted mode and generic resolveDeferredTool agent-core/session callback are the intended permanent compatibility boundary. No mobile, Desktop, or Telegram-visible behavior changed.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
